rule: Keep PDUFA 180-day workbench output frozen as PROXY_INVESTMENT_CANDIDATE_ONLY until this data gate is satisfied.
A real PDUFA investment-mode backtest requires an admissible source plus PIT PDUFA calendar and frozen entry/exit rules.
If the selected provider cannot supply historical prices for delisted common stocks the strategy remains proxy-only.
If no point-in-time PDUFA/FDA calendar is available the strategy cannot become an event-driven backtest.
Polygon/Massive may proceed only through a separate bounded entitlement probe for inactive tickers and historical delisted aggregates.
Prefer CRSP through university access; otherwise evaluate Norgate or Sharadar before attempting paid Polygon entitlement work.
